% ============================================================
% ENGLISH COVER LETTER SEED — Standard Business Format
% ============================================================
%
% !! DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE DIRECTLY !!
%
% This is a read-only seed template.
% To generate a cover letter, COPY this file to cover_letters/cover_letter.tex
% and modify ONLY the content placeholders in the copy.
%
% STRUCTURE RULES (do not change):
%   - Packages, margins, spacing must stay as-is.
%   - Both sender and recipient are left-aligned (standard English).
% ============================================================
\documentclass[a4paper,11pt]{article}

\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm, left=2.5cm, right=2.5cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{parskip}  % Block-style paragraphs: no indent, vertical space between

\pagestyle{empty}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}

\begin{document}

% ===== SENDER (left-aligned, from profile.md) =====
Candidate Name \\
123 Example Street \\
12345 Example City \\
\href{mailto:candidate@example.com}{candidate@example.com} \\
+00\,000\,0000000

\vspace{20pt}

% ===== DATE =====
Example City, February 20, 2026

\vspace{20pt}

% ===== RECIPIENT (left-aligned, from job\_description.md) =====
Hiring Manager Name \\
Company Name \\
Street Address \\
City, Postal Code

\vspace{20pt}

% ===== SUBJECT LINE =====
\textbf{Application for: Job Title}

\vspace{12pt}

% ===== SALUTATION =====
Dear Hiring Manager,

% ===== BODY — replace paragraph content only =====

% Paragraph 1: Opening — why this company and this role specifically
Opening paragraph.

% Paragraph 2: Relevant experience, ownership, and concrete value delivered
Second paragraph.

% Paragraph 3: Technical and cultural alignment with the team
Third paragraph.

% Paragraph 4: Closing — availability and call to action
Closing paragraph.

\vspace{20pt}

% ===== CLOSING =====
Kind regards,

\vspace{40pt}

Candidate Name

\end{document}
